name: StringConverter
summary: The StringConverter class converts types to and from the string datatype.

constructors.name: StringConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the StringConverter class

methods.name: CanConvertFrom
methods.signature: public override bool CanConvertFrom(ITypeDescriptorContext context, Type sourceType)
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the source type to the string datatype.

returns.doc: True if possible, false if not possible.

methods.name: CanConvertTo
methods.signature: public override bool CanConvertTo(ITypeDescriptorContext context, Type destinationType)
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the string datatype to the destination type.

returns.doc: True if possible, false if not possible.

methods.name: ConvertFrom
methods.signature: public override Object ConvertFrom(ITypeDescriptorContext context, CultureInfo culture, Object value)
methods.summary: Converts an object from the given culture to the Tekla.Structures.Datatype.String type.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.signature: public override Object ConvertTo(ITypeDescriptorContext context, CultureInfo culture, Object value, Type destinationType)
methods.summary: Converts an object from the string datatype to the given destination type.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string datatype object to be converted.

returns.doc: The given string datatype object converted to the new type.
